# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

function uf_upload_form() {
    if (is_user_logged_in()) {
        ?>
        <form action="" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <label for="profile_picture">Profile Picture (JPEG, PNG):</label>
            <input type="file" name="profile_picture" id="profile_picture" accept=".jpg, .jpeg, .png" required>
            <br>
            <label for="document">Document (PDF, DOC, DOCX):</label>
            <input type="file" name="document" id="document" accept=".pdf, .doc, .docx" required>
            <br>
            <input type="submit" name="uf_upload" value="Upload">
        </form>
        <?php
    } else {
        echo 'You must be logged in to upload files.';
    }
}

add_shortcode('uf_upload_form', 'uf_upload_form');

function uf_handle_upload() {
    if (isset($_POST['uf_upload'])) {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/' . get_current_user_id();
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }

        $allowed_image_types = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png'];
        $allowed_doc_types = ['application/pdf', 'application/msword', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'];

        foreach ($_FILES as $file) {
            if ($file['error'] === UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                $file_type = mime_content_type($file['tmp_name']);
                $file_size = $file['size'];

                if (strpos($file['name'], '.php') !== false) {
                    echo 'Invalid file type.';
                    return;
                }

                if (in_array($file_type, $allowed_image_types) && $file_size <= 2 * 1024 * 1024) {
                    move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $user_dir . '/' . basename($file['name']));
                } elseif (in_array($file_type, $allowed_doc_types) && $file_size <= 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
                    move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $user_dir . '/' . basename($file['name']));
                } else {
                    echo 'File type or size not allowed.';
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

add_action('init', 'uf_handle_upload');
?>
